theme_and_archetype.description: A premium academic question bank. Requires a professional 'command center' feel combined with high-end aesthetics. Deep dark cosmic backgrounds, translucent glass cards, restrained neon indigo/gold accents, and high data hierarchy.

typography.hindi_text: Use default system fallback but ensure it's wrapped in the primary heading styles.

sidebar.style: fixed vertical, glass_heavy background, backdrop-blur-xl, border-r border-white/10

cosmic_background_1.description: Purple and blue light illustration, use for Login screen background with dark overlay.

cosmic_background_2.description: Dynamic gradient with vivid blues and purples, alternative abstract background.

university_architectural.description: Premium university architecture, use for decorative image in settings or feature panels.

student_studying.description: Student taking exam in the dark, useful for mock test empty states or banners.

testing.rules: All interactive elements (buttons, links, inputs, form submits, navigation items) MUST include a 'data-testid' attribute using kebab-case role-based naming (e.g., 'login-submit-button', 'sidebar-nav-dashboard').

instructions_to_main_agent: Set up Tailwind CSS configuration to include the custom colors and extended spacing/border-radius.
Implement the Layout wrapper applying the dark cosmic gradient ('bg-gradient-to-br from-[#0B0A1F] via-[#16113A] to-[#0A0518]') to the main body/root.
Create a reusable GlassCard component that implements 'backdrop-blur-xl bg-white/5 border border-white/10'. Do not use plain white or flat grey screens anywhere.
Build a premium dark sidebar navigation using Lucide icons. Highlight active tabs with Gold (#D4AF37).

Design the Login Page using the cosmic_background_1 image behind a heavy glassmorphism card. Include the Hindi text 'प्रश्नकोश', tagline 'Jignyasa • Knowledge • Excellence', and footer text 'Secure • Reliable • Built for Education'.
Develop the Dashboard using a Bento grid layout for statistics (e.g., total questions, coverage), a Recharts donut chart for Academic Coverage, and a recent activity feed.
Use JavaScript (.js or .jsx) exclusively, not TypeScript (.tsx).
Include the global footer: 'Powered by SmartGenEduX @ 2026 | Prashnakosh Beta'.
